description: Configures the DNS records required to connect your custom domain to Coreware. Adds a routing CNAME to point your domain to Coreware infrastructure and an AWS ACM DNS validation CNAME to issue an SSL certificate.
variableDescription: acmValidationName: The ACM certificate validation CNAME host prefix relative to the apex domain (e.g. _81ca9d65c3b6cc12a56dbef97c478782). acmValidationValue: The unique prefix of the ACM validation target, before the fixed .acm-validations.aws suffix (e.g. _546055a181acf858b7e2b39b43932277.jkddzztszm).
